title: glechoma foliosa
intro: Glechoma foliosa, also known as creeping thyme or creeping lemon balm, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic. The health benefits of Glechoma foliosa include its potential to ease digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Glechoma foliosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
